title: NeuroLearn
impact: Built a personalized learning system using prompt pipelines and structured input/output parsing to dynamically adapt content relevance.
description: Designed a scalable Django backend and built a React-based frontend dashboard to visualize personalized study plans. Integrated Gemini LLM APIs via OpenRouter. Implemented performance-based feedback loops and async task processing.
architecture_highlights: API-driven frontend consuming versioned DRF endpoints
Frontend-backend contract with structured response schemas
Asynchronous Prompt Processing (Celery + Redis)
State-machine driven study session persistence

technical_challenge.problem: High latency in LLM responses impacted user session flow.
technical_challenge.mitigation: Addressed using Celery-based async task queues and response caching.

design_decisions: Celery over sync processing → avoids blocking during LLM calls
Database persistence over in-memory state → ensures recovery on network drops

proof.architecture: User → Django → Gemini → Context Manager → Postgres

title: HireIQ
impact: Designed a distributed scraping and analysis pipeline reducing manual job discovery effort by 80%.
description: Built a multi-worker Django-Celery architecture for automated job discovery. Leveraged structured prompt pipelines for JD-Resume matching and automated apply-flow detection using Selenium.
architecture_highlights: API-driven UI with loading states, error handling, and retry logic
Distributed Scraper Architecture with fault isolation
Structured LLM scoring engine for JD matching
Multi-tenant application tracking data model

technical_challenge.problem: Evolving anti-bot protections on target job portals caused frequent scraper failures.
technical_challenge.mitigation: Addressed using adaptive scraping strategies with custom retry logic and rotation tuning.

design_decisions: Worker-per-source strategy → prevents a single target failure from halting the entire pipeline
Exponential Backoff → maintains target site reliability and prevents aggressive rate-limiting

title: IntelliTrade
impact: Designed a backend optimized for low-latency trade signal processing and automated multi-asset execution.
description: Built a modular Django backend integrating brokerage APIs (Kotak, Zerodha) for market data ingestion and trade execution. Optimized strategy execution pipelines for multi-asset trading with modular isolation.
architecture_highlights: Mutual TLS & API Key Auth for secure brokerage integration
Endpoints optimized for low-latency trade signals
Structured audit logging for full trade traceability
Event-driven market data ingestion pipeline

technical_challenge.problem: Processing high-frequency real-time market data without bottlenecking strategy logic.
technical_challenge.mitigation: Addressed using a decoupled ingestion-execution pipeline and multi-asset strategy isolator.

design_decisions: Event-driven over linear architecture → ensures trade strategy doesn't block ingestion flow
Modular strategy isolation → ensures failure in one asset class doesn't impact overall stability

proof.architecture: Exchange → WebSocket → Django Broker → AWS RDS

title: Snk
impact: Ensures high reliability in cross-device synchronization using manifest-based verification.
description: Designed a secure file synchronization engine with manifest-based diffing. Built a mobile-first storage system leveraging AWS S3 and Cognito for backups and parity verification.
architecture_highlights: Manifest Sync Engine with MD5 integrity checks
AWS Cognito User Pool for secure identity management
S3 Multipart upload integration for reliability
Local-first architecture for offline-safe syncing

technical_challenge.problem: Handling large-file synchronization over unstable mobile network connections.
technical_challenge.mitigation: Addressed using multipart upload resumes and manifest-based diffing.

design_decisions: Manifest-based diffing over full comparison → significantly reduces mobile bandwidth usage
Client-side MD5 hashing → ensures cloud-to-device data parity verification

title: Gossipy
impact: Built an optimized pipeline that synchronizes audio chunks with LLM responses for natural interactions.
description: Designed a voice-first chat app leveraging AWS speech services. Built an optimized pipeline including prompt pipelines that synchronizes audio chunks with LLM responses for natural interactions.
architecture_highlights: Real-time pipeline: Transcribe → Gemini → Polly
Bi-directional AWS connectivity for STT/TTS
Stateful chat context management
Optimized audio chunking feedback logic

technical_challenge.problem: Ambient noise and network latency caused inaccurate STT and sluggish feedback.
technical_challenge.mitigation: Used AWS Transcribe over client-side libraries to improve accuracy in noisy environments.

design_decisions: AWS Transcribe over local libs → improved accuracy in noisy environments
Polly Neural voices over standard → delivered a natural and humane feedback experience
